name: jira-cloud-mcp
description: Manage Jira Cloud issues, sprints, boards, filters, and custom fields

tools.name: manage_jira_issue
tools.description: Get, create, update, delete, move, transition, comment on, or link Jira issues

tools.name: manage_jira_filter
tools.description: Search for issues using JQL queries, or manage saved filters

tools.name: manage_jira_project
tools.description: List projects or get project details

tools.name: manage_jira_board
tools.description: List boards or get board details

tools.name: manage_jira_sprint
tools.description: Manage sprints and assign issues to sprints

tools.name: analyze_jira_issues
tools.description: Compute project metrics over a set of issues selected by JQL

tools.name: queue_jira_operations
tools.description: Execute multiple Jira operations in a single call
